entries.title: OpenAI updates its Agents SDK to help enterprises build safer, more capable agents
entries.description: OpenAI has expanded the capabilities of its agent-building toolkit, as agentic AI continues to grow in popularity.

entries.title: Hightouch reaches $100M ARR fueled by marketing tools powered by AI
entries.description: The startup says it grew its ARR by $70 million in just 20 months after launching an AI agent platform for marketers.

entries.title: LinkedIn data shows AI isn’t to blame for hiring decline… yet
entries.description: LinkedIn says hiring is down 20% since 2022, but blames higher interest rates — not AI — for the slowdown.

entries.title: AI learning app Gizmo levels up with 13M users and a $22M investment
entries.description: Gizmo, an AI-powered learning platform, has attracted more than 13 million users and just secured $22 million in Series A funding.

entries.title: Can AI judge journalism? A Thiel-backed startup says yes, even if it risks chilling whistleblowers
entries.description: Objection, a Thiel-backed startup, aims to use AI to judge journalism, letting users pay to challenge stories. Critics warn it could chill whistleblowers and reshape how media accountability works.

entries.title: Google rolls out a native Gemini app for Mac
entries.description: You can share anything on their screen with Gemini to get help with what they're looking at in the moment, including local files.

entries.title: The musician-turned-biotech-founder waiting to fundraise
entries.description: When Grammy-nominated singer-songwriter Aloe Blacc got COVID despite being vaccinated and boosted, he tried to fund research for a better solution. What he quickly found out? You can’t just write a ch

entries.title: India’s vibe-coding startup Emergent enters OpenClaw-like AI agent space
entries.description: Emergent's Wingman lets users manage and automate tasks through chat on platforms like WhatsApp and Telegram.

entries.title: After sale of its shoe business, Allbirds pivots to AI
entries.description: Allbirds is ditching wool sneakers for AI servers, rebranding as NewBird AI after locking in a $50M convertible financing facility.

entries.title: Reid Hoffman weighs in on the ‘tokenmaxxing’ debate
entries.description: Reid Hoffman says tracking AI token use can gauge adoption, but cautions it should be paired with context and not treated as a direct productivity metric.

entries.title: Adobe’s new Firefly AI assistant can use Creative Cloud apps to complete tasks
entries.description: Adobe says the assistant can work across apps like Firefly, Photoshop, Premiere, Lightroom, Express,  Illustrator and its other apps to do tasks for you.

entries.title: Gitar, a startup that uses agents to secure code, emerges from stealth with $9 million
entries.description: The company uses AI to review code that, more often than not these days, has also been generated by AI.

entries.title: This startup is betting tokenmaxxing will create the next compute giant
entries.description: Parasail raised $32 million in a Series A, signaling a fractured future of models and compute.

entries.title: Anthropic’s rise is giving some OpenAI investors second thoughts
entries.description: One investor who has backed both companies told the FT that justifying OpenAI's recent round required assuming an IPO valuation of $1.2 trillion or more — making Anthropic's current $380 billion valua

entries.title: Anthropic co-founder confirms the company briefed the Trump administration on Mythos
entries.description: In an interview at the Semafor World Economy summit this week, Anthropic co-founder Jack Clark explained why the company was still engaged with the U.S. government while simultaneously suing them.

entries.title: Meta raises Quest 3 and Quest 3S prices due to RAM shortage
entries.description: Starting April 19, the price of the Meta Quest 3S (128GB) and Meta Quest 3S (256GB) will go up by $50 to $349.99 and $449.99, respectively. The price of the Meta Quest 3 is going up by $100 to $599.99

entries.title: Canva’s AI assistant can now call various tools to make designs for you
entries.description: The latest version of Canva's AI assistant lets users create editable designs with text prompts.

entries.title: This simulation startup wants to be the Cursor for physical AI
entries.description: Antioch raised a $8.5 million seed round to create simulation tools for a new generation of robot builders.
